SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-28-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-28-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-28-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STAEHR, SUSANNE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CASTILLO, MIRIAM $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,575.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

ORDER ON (SC-105A) REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER (SMALL CLAIMS). THE REQUEST IS: DENIED. - JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL -
